//===== rAthena Script =======================================
//= Card Seller A-Z
//===== Description: =========================================
//= Sells normal cards dropped by non-MVP monsters.
//= Enchant cards and cards only dropped by MVP monsters are excluded.
//= Generated from the active Renewal YAML databases in this update.
//= This version has no SQL table dependency.
//============================================================

prontera,155,177,5	script	Card Seller	100,{
	mes "[Card Seller]";
	mes "Welcome!";
	mes "I sell normal monster cards for 1,000,000 Zeny each.";
	mes "MVP cards and enchant cards are not included.";
	next;
	switch(select("A Cards (67):B Cards (48):C Cards (37):D Cards (51):E Cards (32):F Cards (34):G Cards (51):H Cards (29):I Cards (21):J Cards (9):K Cards (18):L Cards (22):M Cards (57):N Cards (19):O Cards (22):P Cards (47):Q Cards (1):R Cards (40):S Cards (76):T Cards (36):U Cards (2):V Cards (17):W Cards (21):Y Cards (4):Z Cards (11):Close")) {
	case 1:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#A",1;
		end;
	case 2:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#B",1;
		end;
	case 3:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#C",1;
		end;
	case 4:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#D",1;
		end;
	case 5:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#E",1;
		end;
	case 6:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#F",1;
		end;
	case 7:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#G",1;
		end;
	case 8:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#H",1;
		end;
	case 9:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#I",1;
		end;
	case 10:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#J",1;
		end;
	case 11:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#K",1;
		end;
	case 12:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#L",1;
		end;
	case 13:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#M",1;
		end;
	case 14:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#N",1;
		end;
	case 15:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#O",1;
		end;
	case 16:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#P",1;
		end;
	case 17:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#Q",1;
		end;
	case 18:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#R",1;
		end;
	case 19:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#S",1;
		end;
	case 20:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#T",1;
		end;
	case 21:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#U",1;
		end;
	case 22:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#V",1;
		end;
	case 23:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#W",1;
		end;
	case 24:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#Y",1;
		end;
	case 25:
		close2;
		callshop "card_mob#Z",1;
		end;
	case 26:
		close;
	}
	close;
}
